title: taraxacum parvuliforme
intro: Taraxacum parvuliforme, also known as the small-leaved dandelion or dwarf dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum parvuliforme are numerous and include the ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activity. Taraxacum parvuliforme can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
